overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a wilderness trail at dusk, holding a torch. The character moves from a dry path through purple heather into a wet, muddy area with stream crossings, with the torch casting dynamic shadows on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: dry wilderness trail with flowering heather

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dry dirt path holding a lit torch that illuminates the ground ahead

entered.detail: dry brown dirt trail winding through the wilderness
dense dark forest forming the horizon boundary
purple flowering bushes lining the right side of the trail
grassy embankment rising on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dry dirt trail through an open wilderness area at dusk. Purple heather bushes line the right side of the path while grassy slopes rise on the left, with a dense forest tree line visible in the distance against the darkening overcast sky.

events.description: ground becomes wet and stream water appears alongside the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it transitions to muddy terrain with water visible on the sides

entered.detail: water from a small stream appearing alongside and crossing the path
tall grass reeds growing on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes increasingly wet and muddy as the character approaches a stream crossing. Tall reeds appear on the right side while the purple heather disappears from view behind. The torchlight reflects off the damp ground and water surface as the path surface changes from dry to wet.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy forest trail with standing water

agents.ego_description: walking through the muddy section with reflective water puddles visible on the path surface

entered.detail: standing water puddles covering sections of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the muddy trail which now features prominent standing water puddles reflecting the torchlight. The tall reeds give way to denser forest vegetation as the stream water moves to the left side, while the path remains wet and muddy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wilderness trail at dusk that transforms from a dry upland path into a saturated, muddy wetland. It begins with the character walking along a dry dirt trail flanked by purple heather and grassy slopes under a darkening overcast sky. As the character advances, the purple heather disappears and the terrain becomes increasingly wet, with the path shifting into a muddy stream crossing lined by tall reeds. The scene then evolves as the torchlight begins to reflect off standing water puddles and damp surfaces, while the reeds give way to denser forest vegetation. Finally, the camera continues forward as the stream moves to the left, leaving the character to navigate a persistently muddy trail deep within the wilderness.
